name: Greenland Holdings Corporation Limited
summary: Greenland Holdings Corporation Limited engages in the development of real estate properties in China and internationally. The company develops ultra-high rise buildings, urban complex projects, high speed rail station business districts, and industrial parks and zones. It is also involved in the production, processing, storage, transport, and distribution of coal; and storage, transportation, trading, retail, etc. of crude oil. In addition, the company engages in the commercial and hotel operations, including operation of supermarkets and hotels, as well as provision of G-Club global member platform, an O2O platform that offers the members with integrated wireless application, business tourism, real property, automobile, energy, consumption, finance, and football club services. Further, it provides finance services, such as financial asset management, trust, investment banking, and small loans services. Additionally, the company engages in the investment and construction of railway projects in various regions in China, as well as urban development of the regions along the subways; and national housing construction projects, general construction contractor, and municipal public works. Greenland Holdings Corporation Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
